turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
My oven isn't heating at all — a GE JB645RKSS.
Sorry about that — a GE JB645RKSS oven not heating. When did it start, and is there any error code?
It won't get warm, started this morning, no code showing.
Let's try a reset first: switch the range off at the breaker for two minutes, then restore power and set a bake temperature to see if it heats.
I tried the breaker reset like you said and it's still cold.
Thanks for trying that — a no-heat oven after a reset usually means a failed bake element or igniter, which needs a technician. What's your zip code so I can find someone near you?
My zip is 60614. Yes, please get someone out.
For your GE JB645RKSS in 60614 I have Marcus Lee available tomorrow, July 11th, from 8:00 to 10:00 AM, or Friday, July 12th, from 12:00 to 2:00 PM. Which works better?
Yes, that time works — book it.
Let's confirm the details: Marcus Lee, tomorrow, July 11th, 8:00 to 10:00 AM, for your GE JB645RKSS oven in 60614. Shall I book that?
Yes, that time works — book it.
Booked — Marcus Lee, July 11th, 8:00 to 10:00 AM, for your GE oven. You'll get a confirmation with the details shortly.

symptoms.description: oven will not heat at all, still cold after a breaker reset

steps_given: Reset the range at the breaker for two minutes, then restore power and set a bake temperature.
